issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes specific environments (Docker, Next.js) limiting cross-platform applicability.
Setup uses git clone and docker compose without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: add-cookieless-analytics-nextjs
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows of Umami but may forget the data-website-id attribute or custom event API; treatment uses next/script with defer, src=.../script.js and data-website-id, adds umami.track(name, data) plus data-umami-event, and notes the no-consent-banner outcome.

scenarios.name: umami-api-dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Baseline cannot reliably recall the exact /api/websites/{id}/pageviews and /api/websites/{id}/metrics?type=url endpoints with startAt/endAt/unit params; treatment uses both endpoints with the Authorization: Bearer header as documented.
